text: In my current scheme, sometimes I forget that I have Parkinson's.
Koios helps me identify a patient's pains quickly and offer better care.
Sharing objective data with my doctor has improved our conversations significantly.

question: Do I need a special device?
answer: No. Parkiwatch runs on the smartphone and smartwatch you already own. There is no clinic-grade hardware to buy and no study wearable to charge or return.

question: Is there anything I have to do each day?
answer: Nothing. There are no tasks, tests or diaries to fill in. Parkiwatch captures everyday movement and rest passively in the background, so your data reflects real life rather than a one-off snapshot.

question: What is the Q-index?
answer: The Q-index is a single, clear measure of how your quality of life is trending over time, built from 40+ validated digital measures. It is designed to be easy to read at a glance and to share with your care team.

question: Who can see my data?
answer: Your data is yours. It is private by design and shared only when you choose — for example, when you bring a summary to an appointment or invite your clinician to follow along.

question: Is Koios a medical device?
answer: No. Koios Care is a wellness solution. It does not diagnose or treat disease, and it does not replace your clinician's judgement. It gives you and your care team a clearer, objective picture between visits.

label: reported improvement in health-related quality of life
of patients' days captured passively, with no added effort
validated digital measures of neurological & body health
